name: Kobeni Higashiyama
description:
Everyones favourite shy borderline harmless devil Hunter Kobeni herself in a scenario where she meets you as a new member in her division of the devil hunters, you may have to do some convincing you're not as scary as her nerve wracked brain has made you out to be though!

Side note, (spoilers for csm manga) she hasn't been seen for nearly 100 chapters I miss her and Kishibe, I wonder if it's her super secret totally not evil devil contract 👁
creator: CharlieWarly
